generated_oml:
instance HokuyoLIDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for environmental data capture"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LidarPointCloudsTransmitted
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for vehicle state and environmental data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation controlling vehicle steering angles"
]

instance PhysicalVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle built from Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium with NVIDIA Jetson NX, Orin Nano, Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, Intel D435i, Vedder ESC"
    base:contains HokuyoLIDARSensor, IntelDepthCamera, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator
]

instance LidarPointCloudsTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLIDARSensor
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera
]

instance LiDARPointCloudsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudsTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringEnabler
]

instance DepthCameraImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth camera data from Intel D435i"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DepthProcessingEnabler
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for LiDAR point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant adaptive cruise control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance DBSCANClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering enabler"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter-based object tracking enabler"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control logic enabler"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database storage enabler"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DepthProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Depth camera data processing enabler"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web-based remote management enabler"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data monitoring and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDisplayInsight, ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system execution offloading to DT"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDesiredSpeedInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote ACC control via web UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteACCControlAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of vehicle state and environment"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeDisplayInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Report generation for developer troubleshooting"
]

instance ACCDesiredSpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Desired speed derived from ACC control logic"
]

instance RemoteACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote control of ACC system via web-based UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VehicleStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of vehicle state and environment"
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for communication between components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and model implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for performance-critical components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for model implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking, enable/disable commands) from the DT to the PT's motor and steering actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms per 3GPP TS 22.185."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via ROS2 intra-vehicle communication and Wi-Fi inter-entity communication with Data Translation FE handling data serialization and unit conversions."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during development (troubleshooting) and operation phases, covering 'as operated' representation of the physical vehicle."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-component communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication with data serialization handled by Data Translation FE; end-to-end latency ≤100 ms."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle-mounted Jetson hardware; Digital Twin Entity and User Entity hosted in cloud."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture; ISO 15622 for ACC functionality; ROS2 middleware standard."
]
